name: experiment-lifecycle
description: Design and dispatch GPU experiments like a researcher: a pre-registration + cross-family validity-gate workflow. Propose with taste, write a DESIGN.md pre-registration, clear it with the human through verify-claims gates (facts + design logic), emit a thin START.md brief + CHECKLIST.md verification gates, then dispatch the locked brief to a fresh-context executor. Pairs with verify-claims (the gates) and run-experiment (execution).
